ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>3<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>The response is contextually relevant, aligns with the persona of a smuggler who might negotiate access to restricted areas but lacks some consistency in maintaining an evasive character.

baseline_no_context<TAB>3<TAB>2<TAB>4<TAB>3<TAB>The response is somewhat relevant and natural, though it misses the mark on persona consistency as a smuggler wouldn't typically engage in trade discussions at an archive.
"Player's request is inconsistent with Smuggler persona and context."
